Bill.LongTitleEn: An Act respecting cyber security, amending the Telecommunications Act and making consequential amendments to other Acts

Bill.LongTitle: An Act respecting cyber security, amending the Telecommunications Act and making consequential amendments to other Acts

WebReferences.TitleEn: Sunny Handa et al., “House of Commons Re-Introduces Federal Cybersecurity Legislation,” Blake, Cassels & Graydon, 23 June 2025.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Sunny Handa et al., « La Chambre des communes se penche de nouveau sur un projet de loi en matière de cybersécurité », Blake, Cassels & Graydon, 27 juin 2025.
WebReferences.Title: Sunny Handa et al., “House of Commons Re-Introduces Federal Cybersecurity Legislation,” Blake, Cassels & Graydon, 23 June 2025.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Molly Reynolds et al., “Government re-introduces cybersecurity bill for “vital” federal industries,” Torys, 26 June 2025.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Molly Reynolds et al., « Le gouvernement réintroduit un projet de loi sur la cybersécurité pour les secteurs fédéraux « critiques » », Torys, 26 juin 2025.
WebReferences.Title: Molly Reynolds et al., “Government re-introduces cybersecurity bill for “vital” federal industries,” Torys, 26 June 2025.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Colin Guldimann and Naomi Powell, “Back from the Grave: Bill C-8 Revives Comprehensive Cybersecurity Law,” McMillan, 3 July 2025.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Colin Guldimann and Naomi Powell, “Back from the Grave: Bill C-8 Revives Comprehensive Cybersecurity Law,” McMillan, 3 July 2025. (Disponible en anglais seulement.)
WebReferences.Title: Colin Guldimann and Naomi Powell, “Back from the Grave: Bill C-8 Revives Comprehensive Cybersecurity Law,” McMillan, 3 July 2025.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Charter Statement - Bill C-8: An Act respecting cyber security, amending the Telecommunications Act and making consequential amendments to other Acts (Tabled 2025-09-23)
WebReferences.TitleFr: noncé concernant la Charte - Projet de loi C-8 : Loi concernant la cybersécurité, modifiant la Loi sur les télécommunications et apportant des modifications corrélatives à d’autres lois (Déposé 2025-09-23)
WebReferences.Title: Charter Statement - Bill C-8: An Act respecting cyber security, amending the Telecommunications Act and making consequential amendments to other Acts (Tabled 2025-09-23)

BibliographicNotices.Title: Privacy commissioner calls for more oversight of cabinet powers under new national security bill [C-8]
BibliographicNotices.Author: Karunjit Singh
